# Andro Prime

> At-home blood tests for men. UKAS ISO 15189 accredited lab. Results in 48 hours of lab receipt. No GP needed. Based in the UK.

Andro Prime helps men understand their hormone and recovery markers through at-home finger-prick blood tests. Results are delivered to a private dashboard within 48 hours of lab receipt, in plain English, with a specific recommendation based on each man's numbers. The service also offers evidence-based supplement subscriptions recommended only where blood test results indicate a deficiency.

## Diagnostic Test Kits

- [Testosterone Health Check — Kit 1](https://andro-prime.com/kits/testosterone): Tests Total Testosterone, SHBG, Albumin, Free Testosterone (calculated), and Free Androgen Index (FAI). £99 (£89.10 with a partner code). For men with unexplained fatigue, reduced drive, or loss of muscle. UKAS ISO 15189 accredited lab. Results in 48 hours of lab receipt.
- [Energy & Recovery Check — Kit 2](https://andro-prime.com/kits/energy-recovery): Tests Vitamin D, Active B12, hs-CRP (inflammation), and Ferritin. £119 (£107.10 with a partner code). For active men with prolonged soreness, lethargy, or poor recovery despite training and sleep.
- [Hormone & Recovery Check — Kit 3](https://andro-prime.com/kits/hormone-recovery): Full 9-marker panel combining Kit 1 and Kit 2 — Total Testosterone, SHBG, Albumin, Free Testosterone (calculated), FAI, Vitamin D, Active B12, hs-CRP, and Ferritin. £179 (£161.10 with a partner code). The most complete picture — all testosterone markers plus energy, recovery, and inflammation. Recommended where symptoms span both categories.

## Supplements

Supplements are only recommended where blood test results confirm a specific deficiency. They are not sold as a guess.

- [Daily Stack](https://andro-prime.com/supplements/daily-stack): Daily supplement sachet. £34.95/month. Contains Zinc, Magnesium Glycinate, Vitamin D3 (4,000 IU), and Active B12 (Methylcobalamin). Recommended for confirmed Vitamin D or B12 deficiency identified on Kit 2 or Kit 3.
- [Joint & Recovery Collagen](https://andro-prime.com/supplements/collagen): Collagen supplement powder. £29.95/month. Contains 10g hydrolysed collagen peptides, UC-II, Vitamin C, and MSM. Recommended for elevated hs-CRP (1–10 mg/L) on Kit 2 or Kit 3, AND confirmed joint symptoms.

## How It Works

- [How It Works](https://andro-prime.com/how-it-works): Four steps — order kit, collect a finger-prick sample at home, post back using the pre-paid Royal Mail envelope, view results in your dashboard within 48 hours of lab receipt. No clinic visit required.

## Founding-Member List

- [Founding-Member List](https://andro-prime.com/founding-member): A non-cash email opt-in for men whose Kit 1 or Kit 3 result shows testosterone below 12 nmol/L. No payment, no deposit, no commitment. Men on the list are first invited to the clinical TRT service when it launches, pending CQC registration.

## Educational Content

- [Blog](https://andro-prime.com/blog): Research-backed articles on testosterone, men's health, and why standard reference ranges often fail the men tested against them.
- [The Myth of the 'Normal' Range](https://andro-prime.com/blog/the-myth-of-the-normal-range): Why laboratory reference ranges for testosterone are derived from a population cross-section, not an optimised cohort — and why falling within the range doesn't mean you're functioning at your best.

## Information

- [FAQ](https://andro-prime.com/faq): Common questions about testing, result turnaround, data privacy, and what results mean.
- [About](https://andro-prime.com/about): About Andro Prime. Founder: Keith Antony. Clinical oversight: Dr Ewa Lindo, GMC-registered GP, Harley Street TRT-trained prescriber.
- [Test Selector](https://andro-prime.com/test-selector): Three-question quiz to route men to the right test kit based on symptoms.

## Partner Codes & Discounts

Partner codes (used by trainers, coaches, and approved affiliates) apply a flat 10% discount on any kit. There are no larger discounts available. No stacked offers, no retest discounts beyond the 10% partner code.

## Clinical Boundaries

Andro Prime is currently operating as a wellness diagnostics service (non-regulated, Phase 0). The clinical TRT subscription service is not yet live and is pending CQC registration. The founding-member list is a non-cash waitlist for that future service. No TRT prescriptions, confirmatory testing, or clinical services are available at this time.

## Lab & Compliance

- Laboratory partner: Vitall, UKAS ISO 15189 accredited (confirmed 2026-05-01).
- Clinical oversight: Dr Ewa Lindo, GMC-registered prescriber.
- Result SLA: 48 hours from lab receipt of sample.
- All supplement claims use EFSA-approved health claims only.
- No medicinal claims are made on any product or page.
